scripts.test:linux: docker run --rm --platform=linux/amd64 -v $(pwd):/work -v penpotqa_pw_browsers:/pw-browsers -e PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=/pw-browsers -w /work mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.60.0-noble bash -c "npx playwright install --with-deps chrome && npx playwright test --project=chrome --grep-invert 'PERF'"
scripts.test:linux:ui: docker run --rm --platform=linux/amd64 -it -v $(pwd):/work -v penpotqa_pw_browsers:/pw-browsers -e PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=/pw-browsers -w /work -p 8080:8080 mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.60.0-noble bash -c "npx playwright install --with-deps chrome && npx playwright test --ui --ui-host=0.0.0.0 --ui-port=8080"
